mapper.select: SELECT lt.*, p.title AS poem_title, u.username FROM learning_task lt LEFT JOIN poem p ON lt.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON lt.user_id = u.id WHERE lt.id = #{id}
SELECT lt.*, p.title AS poem_title, u.username FROM learning_task lt LEFT JOIN poem p ON lt.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON lt.user_id = u.id WHERE lt.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY lt.deadline ASC

SELECT lt.*, p.title AS poem_title, u.username FROM learning_task lt LEFT JOIN poem p ON lt.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON lt.user_id = u.id WHERE lt.user_id = #{userId} AND lt.status = #{status} ORDER BY lt.deadline ASC

SELECT lt.*, p.title AS poem_title, u.username FROM learning_task lt LEFT JOIN poem p ON lt.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON lt.user_id = u.id WHERE lt.status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND lt.reminded = 0 AND lt.deadline <= #{deadline} AND lt.deadline > NOW()

SELECT lt.*, p.title AS poem_title, u.username FROM learning_task lt LEFT JOIN poem p ON lt.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON lt.user_id = u.id WHERE lt.status IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND lt.deadline < #{now}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_task (user_id, poem_id, title, status, deadline) VALUES (#{userId}, #{poemId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{deadline})
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_task SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE learning_task SET reminded = #{reminded} WHERE id = #{id}
